title: CompetencyRelations
description: A relations file for the competency model — the JSON contract equivalent of relations/<type>.yaml. Holds a list of typed edges connecting competency-model nodes. Each edge names its 'type', 'from' and 'to' node ids; some types carry extra fields ('primary' for classified_in, 'assessment' for has_competency).

nodeId.description: A competency-model node id: '<prefix>:' + dot-separated slug levels, each matching [a-z0-9-]

Relation.description: A single typed edge. Endpoint prefixes are fixed per type: classified_in (competency->area), owned_by (area->person), has_competency (person->competency), backed_by (competency->resource), applied_in (competency->sector), evidenced_by (competency->evidence).

primary.description: Applies to 'classified_in' only. Exactly one classified_in edge per competency must set primary:true (cross-edge cardinality is enforced by the curator, not this schema).

assessment.description: Applies to 'has_competency' only. Inline assessment block, or omit and reference a standalone assessment node elsewhere.
